title: montia aquatica var. arvensis
intro: Montia aquatica var. arvensis, also known as water miner's lettuce, is a variety of the Montia aquatica plant, which is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Montia aquatica var. arvensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be consumed raw as a salad green or used in cooking.
